'''鈭歽-t-v''' ('''kayatav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoise|hoise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoise|hoise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayatav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyatav|thiyatav]] || [[word:jiyatav|jiyatav]] || [[word:shiyatav|shiyatav]] || [[word:kiyatav|kiyatav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyatav|thuthuyatav]] || [[word:jujuyatav|jujuyatav]] || [[word:shushuyatav|shushuyatav]] || [[word:kukuyatav|kukuyatav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyatav|thuyatav]] || [[word:juyatav|juyatav]] || [[word:shuyatav|shuyatav]] || [[word:kuyatav|kuyatav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyatav|thuyatav]] || [[word:juyatav|juyatav]] || [[word:shuyatav|shuyatav]] || [[word:kuyatav|kuyatav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyatav|theyatav]] || [[word:jeyatav|jeyatav]] || [[word:sheyatav|sheyatav]] || [[word:keyatav|keyatav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyatav|thothoyatav]] || [[word:jojoyatav|jojoyatav]] || [[word:shoshoyatav|shoshoyatav]] || [[word:kokoyatav|kokoyatav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyatav|thoyatav]] || [[word:joyatav|joyatav]] || [[word:shoyatav|shoyatav]] || [[word:koyatav|koyatav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyatav|thoyatav]] || [[word:joyatav|joyatav]] || [[word:shoyatav|shoyatav]] || [[word:koyatav|koyatav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yatav|th忙yatav]] || [[word:j忙yatav|j忙yatav]] || [[word:sh忙yatav|sh忙yatav]] || [[word:k忙yatav|k忙yatav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayatav|thathayatav]] || [[word:jajayatav|jajayatav]] || [[word:shashayatav|shashayatav]] || [[word:kakayatav|kakayatav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayatav|thayatav]] || [[word:jayatav|jayatav]] || [[word:shayatav|shayatav]] || [[word:kayatav|kayatav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayatav|thayatav]] || [[word:jayatav|jayatav]] || [[word:shayatav|shayatav]] || [[word:kayatav|kayatav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayatav|shayatav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayatav|goshayatav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayatav|gokishayatav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayatavn眉|shayatavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayatavnkn眉|goshayatavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatavn眉|gokishayatavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayatavsh毛|shayatavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayatavnksh毛|goshayatavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayatavsh毛|gokishayatavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatavro|shayatavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatavnkro|goshayatavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatavro|gokishayatavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatavmu|shayatavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatavnkmu|goshayatavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatavmu|gokishayatavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayatavsher|shayatavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayatavnksher|goshayatavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayatavsher|gokishayatavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayatavng|shayatavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayatavnkng|goshayatavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayatavng|gokishayatavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayatavya|shayatavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayatavnkya|goshayatavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayatavya|gokishayatavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayatavyam|shayatavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayatavnkyam|goshayatavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayatavyam|gokishayatavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatavn眉sh毛|shayatavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatavnkn眉sh毛|goshayatavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatavn眉sh毛|gokishayatavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatavn眉ro|shayatavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatavnkn眉ro|goshayatavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatavn眉ro|gokishayatavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatavn眉mu|shayatavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatavnkn眉mu|goshayatavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatavn眉mu|gokishayatavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatavsh毛n眉|shayatavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatavnksh毛n眉|goshayatavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatavsh毛n眉|gokishayatavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatavsh毛ro|shayatavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatavnksh毛ro|goshayatavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatavsh毛ro|gokishayatavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatavsh毛mu|shayatavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatavnksh毛mu|goshayatavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatavsh毛mu|gokishayatavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatavron眉|shayatavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatavnkron眉|goshayatavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatavron眉|gokishayatavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatavrosh毛|shayatavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatavnkrosh毛|goshayatavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatavrosh毛|gokishayatavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatavromu|shayatavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatavnkromu|goshayatavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatavromu|gokishayatavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatavmun眉|shayatavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatavnkmun眉|goshayatavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatavmun眉|gokishayatavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatavmush毛|shayatavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatavnkmush毛|goshayatavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatavmush毛|gokishayatavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatavmuro|shayatavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatavnkmuro|goshayatavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatavmuro|gokishayatavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
